changes_made: Renamed k8s_etcd_backup_configured to k8s_etcd_backup_encrypted for clarity and specificity
review_notes: The functions generally map well to the NIST control CP-9(8) by focusing on encryption of sensitive data and backups in Kubernetes. However, the function k8s_etcd_backup_configured was renamed to k8s_etcd_backup_encrypted to better reflect the cryptographic protection aspect of the control. This change ensures the function name is specific about the encryption requirement.
naming_improvements: Ensure function names explicitly mention encryption when related to cryptographic protection
title: System Backup - System backup | cryptographic protection implement cryptographic mechanisms to p
step1_reasoning: The control CP-9(8) focuses on ensuring that system backups are protected using cryptographic mechanisms. In Kubernetes, this translates to ensuring that sensitive data such as etcd data and Kubernetes Secrets are encrypted at rest. Additionally, ensuring that etcd backups are configured and encrypted aligns with the control's requirement for cryptographic protection of backups.
